name: Hot Fudge Pudding Cake/hershey's
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, stir together the granulated sugar, flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
3. Stir in milk, melted butter, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
4. Pour batter into an ungreased 8-or 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Stir together the remaining granulated sugar, brown sugar, and cocoa; sprinkle mixture evenly over batter.
6. Pour hot water over top; do not stir.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until center is almost set. Let stand 15 minutes.
8. Spoon into dessert dishes, spooning sauce from bottom of pan over top. Garnish with whipped topping, if desired.
About 8 servings.
